title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY ISIC-ISIC, MUNICIPALITY OF VINTAR, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE TO BE KNOWN AS ISIC-ISIC NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 4, 401 (January 28, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10265, November 15, 2012 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY ISIC-ISIC, MUNICIPALITY OF VINTAR, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE TO BE KNOWN AS ISIC-ISIC NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the direct supervision of the Department of Education, a national high school in Barangay Isic-Isic, Municipality of Vintar, Province of Ilocos Norte to be known as Isic-Isic National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Education shall issue the necessary rules and regulations to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Departmentâs program the operationalization of the Isic-Isic National High School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 23, 2011 and July 24, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 15 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
